def negative_warning_or_error_logs_emit_unbounded_payload_text():
    rule_id = "warning_or_error_logs_emit_unbounded_payload_text"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag logs that dump unbounded input or result payloads."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
